scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @sketcherson/server-app -- --host 0.0.0.0" "npm run dev -w @sketcherson/web -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sketcherson/common && npm run build -w @sketcherson/demo-game && npm run build -w @sketcherson/server && npm run build -w @sketcherson/server-app && npm run build -w @sketcherson/web && npm run build -w @sketcherson/web-app
scripts.test: npm run test -w @sketcherson/common && npm run test -w @sketcherson/demo-game && npm run test -w @sketcherson/server && npm run test -w @sketcherson/web
scripts.publish-packages: npm run build && npm test && changeset publish
